name: @omadia/orchestrator-extras
description: Orchestrator-extras tool-set for the byte5 Harness. Bundles ContextRetriever (pre-turn KG/embedding lookup), FactExtractor (LLM-driven KG ingest from chat turns), TopicDetector (per-message embedding-similarity routing), and GraphBackfill (offline graph-evidence catch-up). Consumes the kernel capabilities knowledgeGraph + entityRefBus + embeddingClient + memoryStore via ctx.services.get instead of direct construction.
